my_thoughts: Remaking RM_05. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The comparison_contrast mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is silent_admission_of_failure—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says '(Silence/Inability to produce one)'—silent admission of failure via aporia, cognitive block. Teacher responds '' using comparison contrast to challenges audience, demands embodiment, uses art analogy, lowers standard conditionally. Opening REMAKING move addresses silent admission of failure. Predicting go along compliantly because comparison contrast interventions typically produce this response.
visible_response:
You cannot show me one fashioned 
so; but show me at least one who is forming, who has shown a tendency to be a Stoic. Do me this favor: do not grudge an old man seeing a sight which I have not seen yet. Do you think that you must show me the Zeus of Phidias or the Athena, a work of ivory and gold? Let any of you show me a human soul ready to think as God does, and not to blame either God or man, ready not to be disappointed about anything, not to consider himself damaged by anything, not to be angry, 
not to be envious, not to be jealous.
